# Test fixtures

- `colrv1_test.ttf` — "COLRv1 Static Test Glyphs", 21 KB. Static-only COLRv1
  paint graphs (no variations). Sourced from the `ttf-parser` crate's test
  corpus. Licensed under Apache-2.0 (see `LICENSE-Apache-2.0`).

- `demo_monochrome.ttf` — 400-byte monochrome demo font from the same
  source. Used as a negative case in COLRv1 detection tests.
